use_cases: Display loading progress during data fetching operations
Indicate file upload or download progress to users
Show form submission status during async operations
Provide visual feedback during page transitions
Indicate background processing status in applications
ai_summary: A loading progress bar component featuring a gradient-filled animated bar (orange to yellow) with inset shadow styling for a skeuomorphic effect. The component displays animated blinking dots following 'Loading' text while the bar progresses from 0-100% over 4 seconds, providing clear visual feedback for users during async operations.
